subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord, and my Master! This is a handmaiden who hath believed in Thee and in Thy mighty signs, and is enkindled with the blazing fire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و سیدی و مولائی هذه امة آمنت بک و بایاتک الکبری و اشتعلت بالنار الموقده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
